failure_modes.text: Psychological safety fails when it is redefined as comfort, politeness, or protection from challenge instead of candid truth.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when psychological safety is redefined as comfort, politeness, or protection from challenge instead of candid truth in service of better decisions.
failure_modes.mitigation: Define safety as candor, not comfort: make it explicit that psychological safety means people can challenge ideas, raise concerns, and disagree — not that they are shielded from hard feedback.

failure_modes.text: Leaders can invite openness while leaving ownership, standards, or decision rights too vague for correction to matter.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when leaders invite openness but leave ownership, standards, or decision rights vague, creating talk without correction or accountability.
failure_modes.mitigation: Pair openness with accountability: when inviting truth-telling, also clarify decision rights, quality standards, and ownership so that candor leads to action, not just venting.

failure_modes.text: More discussion becomes a failure mode when the evidence already supports a decision or a reversible experiment.
failure_modes.source_quote: Avoid when teams are using more discussion to postpone hard calls that already have enough evidence for a decision or a reversible experiment.
failure_modes.mitigation: Set a discussion budget: when evidence already points to a clear action or reversible experiment, cap deliberation time and move to execution.

premortem_questions.text: What risk, dissent, or upward challenge is still not being said because of status or fear?
premortem_questions.source_quote: formal status discourages upward challenge despite visible risk

premortem_questions.text: Are decision rights and accountability clear enough that candor can actually change the outcome?
premortem_questions.source_quote: ownership, standards, or decision rights vague

premortem_questions.text: Would the next best move be more challenge or simply making the call now?
premortem_questions.source_quote: postpone hard calls that already have enough evidence

heuristics.text: Define psychological safety as candid challenge in service of better decisions, not as comfort.
heuristics.source_quote: candid truth in service of better decisions

heuristics.text: Pair openness with clear ownership and decision rights so surfaced problems can actually be corrected.
Use safety to widen the set of real perspectives, not to suppress standards or delay reversible action.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on candid truth, upward challenge, and anti-comfort reinterpretation discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor culture-program sprawl because the raw source is stronger on challenge quality, accountability, and decision-relevant candor.
open_questions: The third heuristic compresses several source passages on openness, diversity of views, and reversible action so the chunk stays operational.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on systems-thinking, boundaries, and empathy-like perspective widening as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on authority-bias, confirmation-bias, and commitment pressure, but only clean current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source has explicit tension blocks with authority-bias and confirmation-bias that cleanly map into the current target-id surface.
